author: jih2nn
content:
[FOCIL breakout #36](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2121) <<t:1781614800:R>>! We can discuss:

- Client development
- Spec changes

Today, we have many details to decide and discuss such as IL bitlist, PayloadStatusV2, ACCEPTED payloads and non-finality. Please chime in if you have time. See you soon!
